scripts.qa: npm run sync:web && npm run janitor
scripts.qa:strict: npm run sync:web:check && npm run janitor
scripts.qa:functional: npm run sync:web:check && npm run janitor:functional
scripts.qa:security: npm run sync:web:check && npm run janitor:adversarial && npm run janitor:property && npm run janitor:hygiene && npm run janitor:llm && npm run janitor:llm:runtime
scripts.qa:security:full: npm run qa:security && npm run janitor:dast
scripts.qa:adversarial: npm run sync:web:check && npm run janitor:adversarial
scripts.janitor: npm run janitor:functional && npm run janitor:adversarial && npm run janitor:property && npm run janitor:hygiene && npm run janitor:llm && npm run janitor:llm:runtime
